sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-09-05 17:40
- Distance: 9 km
- Moving time: 47:11
- Elapsed time: 47:27
- Elevation gain: 170.6 m
- Average heart rate: 171 bpm
- Max heart rate: 180 bpm
- Average watts: 245.2 W
- Average speed: 11.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.5 bpm`, ranging from `161.1` to `175.3 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `168.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.8 bpm` (+4.6 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.0 spm`, with a working range of `170.7` to `175.8 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `172.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `174.9 spm` (+2.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:14 /km` across `9.010 km` in `47:11` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:11 /km` and second-half pace was `5:17 /km` (+7 s/km), so pace eased a little late.

- Strava summary HR came in at `171.0 bpm` average and `180 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.3 bpm` in the first half and `175.4 bpm` in the second (+9.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `47:11` out of `47:27` elapsed (99.4%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `174.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `29.6 m` and `62.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `63.8 m` in the first half and `110.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
